parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT tp.user_id FROM core.tracked_pages tp WHERE tp.page_type = 'pricing' AND tp.is_active = true;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (tp.company_id) tp.user_id, tp.company_id, tp.company_name, tp.url AS pricing_url, ps.plan_count, ps.plan_names, ps.has_free_tier, ps.has_enterprise, ps.pricing_model, ps.gating_signals, ps.snapshot_date, ps.meta FROM core.tracked_pages tp JOIN pricing_tracker.pricing_snapshots ps ON ps.tracked_page_id = tp.id WHERE tp.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND tp.page_type = 'pricing' AND tp.is_active = true ORDER BY tp.company_id, ps.snapshot_date DESC;

INSERT INTO packaging.landscape (user_id, company_id, company_name, tier_structure, value_metric, gating_strategy, pricing_url, plan_count, has_free_tier, has_enterprise, snapshot_date, meta) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.company_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.company_name }}', '{{ $json.tier_structure }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.value_metric }}', '{{ $json.gating_strategy }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.pricing_url }}', {{ $json.plan_count }}, {{ $json.has_free_tier }}, {{ $json.has_enterprise }}, '{{ $json.snapshot_date }}'::date, '{}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (user_id, company_id, snapshot_date) DO UPDATE SET tier_structure = EXCLUDED.tier_structure, value_metric = EXCLUDED.value_metric, gating_strategy = EXCLUDED.gating_strategy, pricing_url = EXCLUDED.pricing_url, plan_count = EXCLUDED.plan_count, has_free_tier = EXCLUDED.has_free_tier, has_enterprise = EXCLUDED.has_enterprise;

INSERT INTO packaging.landscape_maps (user_id, report_month, title, content_json, content_md, trends, companies_included) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.report_month }}'::date, '{{ $json.title }}', '{{ $json.content_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.content_md }}', '{{ $json.trends }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.companies_included }}'::text[]) ON CONFLICT (user_id, report_month) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json, content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md, trends = EXCLUDED.trends, companies_included = EXCLUDED.companies_included;
